description.0: A longbow carved from ancient whitewood, once, in ages past, wielded by the Jack Frost King of the northern lands.

0.0: Increase DEF by <cryo>16%</cryo>. When the equipping character's Elemental Skill or Lunar-Crystallize attacks hit opponents, gain the Frost Fae's Favor effect for 6s: Geo DMG inflicted by the equipping character increases by <cryo>40%</cryo>, Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG increases by <cryo>40%</cryo>. While this effect is active, if there are Moondrifts near the equipping character, all other nearby party members will gain the Frost Fae's Mischief effect: Geo DMG dealt increases by <cryo>20%</cryo> and Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG increases by <cryo>20%</cryo>. This effect can be triggered even when the equipping character is off-field.
